CVE-2015-3885.title: Integer overflow in the ljpeg_start function in dcraw 7.00 and ea ...
CVE-2015-3885.description: Integer overflow in the ljpeg_start function in dcraw 7.00 and earlier allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) via a crafted image, which triggers a buffer overflow, related to the len variable.

CVE-2017-13735.title: There is a floating point exception in the kodak_radc_load_raw fu ...
CVE-2017-13735.description: There is a floating point exception in the kodak_radc_load_raw function in dcraw_common.cpp in LibRaw 0.18.2. It will lead to a remote denial of service attack.

CVE-2017-14348.title: LibRaw before 0.18.4 has a heap-based Buffer Overflow in the proc ...
CVE-2017-14348.description: LibRaw before 0.18.4 has a heap-based Buffer Overflow in the processCanonCameraInfo function via a crafted file.

CVE-2020-24870.title: Libraw before 0.20.1 has a stack buffer overflow via LibRaw::iden ...
CVE-2020-24870.description: Libraw before 0.20.1 has a stack buffer overflow via LibRaw::identify_process_dng_fields in identify.cpp.

CVE-2020-35530.title: In LibRaw, there is an out-of-bounds write vulnerability within t ...
CVE-2020-35530.description: In LibRaw, there is an out-of-bounds write vulnerability within the "new_node()" function (libraw\src\x3f\x3f_utils_patched.cpp) that can be triggered via a crafted X3F file.

CVE-2021-3624.title: There is an integer overflow vulnerability in dcraw. When the vic ...
CVE-2021-3624.description: There is an integer overflow vulnerability in dcraw. When the victim runs dcraw with a maliciously crafted X3F input image, arbitrary code may be executed in the victim's system.
